$comment: Chrono Star Wars deck. 100 in-universe events on the BBY/ABY axis (year 0 = Battle of Yavin). 'year' is the signed numeric sort key; 'yearLabel' is shown on reveal; 'description' is the guess clue. Card art lives at /starwars/cards/<slug>.jpg.

cards.title: Founding of the Republic
cards.description: A thousand worlds unite into a single galactic republic.

cards.title: Dawn of the Jedi
cards.description: The first Force monks found an order of light on a mystic world.

cards.title: The Great Hyperspace War
cards.description: Ancient Sith lords wage war on the Republic with dark sorcery.

cards.title: Battle of Ruusan
cards.description: A final clash all but destroys the ancient Sith and the Republic is reborn.

cards.title: The Great Hyperspace Disaster
cards.description: A hyperspace catastrophe scatters deadly wreckage across a system.

cards.title: The Republic Fair
cards.description: Raiders turn a festival of unity into a massacre.

cards.title: Starlight Beacon
cards.description: The Jedi dedicate a gleaming station as a beacon of hope on the frontier.

cards.title: The Drengir Outbreak
cards.description: Carnivorous plant creatures erupt across the frontier.

cards.title: The Nihil Strike
cards.description: Marauder raiders ambush the Republic deep in a glowing nebula.

cards.title: Fall of Starlight Beacon
cards.description: Sabotage sends the great Jedi station falling from the sky in flames.

cards.title: The Boonta Eve Podrace
cards.description: A slave boy wins a deadly podrace and earns his freedom.

cards.title: Invasion of Naboo
cards.description: The Trade Federation blockades and occupies a peaceful green world.

cards.title: Duel of the Fates
cards.description: Two Jedi battle a horned Sith with a double-bladed red blade.

cards.title: The Clone Wars Begin
cards.description: White-armored clone troopers and Jedi storm a desert arena, igniting a galaxy-wide war.

cards.title: Battle of Christophsis
cards.description: Clones and Jedi defend a city of blue crystal towers from droids.

cards.title: The Hutt Hunt
cards.description: A Jedi and her new apprentice rescue a kidnapped Hutt heir from a cliff monastery.

cards.title: Battle of Saleucami
cards.description: Clones clash with droids across a wild frontier world.

cards.title: Liberation of Ryloth
cards.description: Clones free the Twi'lek homeworld from Separatist occupation.

cards.title: The Malevolence
cards.description: Jedi cripple a massive Separatist warship armed with an ion cannon.

cards.title: The Zillo Beast
cards.description: A colossal armored beast is unleashed in the heart of the capital.

cards.title: Battle of Kamino
cards.description: Droids assault the stormy ocean cloning world where the clone army is born.

cards.title: The Gathering
cards.description: Young Jedi venture into ice caves to find their first crystals.

cards.title: The Mortis Gods
cards.description: On a mystical world, Jedi meet living embodiments of the Force.

cards.title: The Citadel
cards.description: Jedi break into an inescapable prison fortress on a lava world.

cards.title: The Return of Maul
cards.description: The horned Sith is found alive and mad on a junk world.

cards.title: Battle of Umbara
cards.description: Clones fight through a glowing alien jungle on a shadowy world.

cards.title: The Deception
cards.description: A Jedi goes undercover as a bounty hunter to foil a plot.

cards.title: The Box
cards.description: Bounty hunters compete in a deadly trial of traps to plot an assassination.

cards.title: Onderon Uprising
cards.description: Jedi train rebels to free their world from droid rule.

cards.title: Massacre of the Nightsisters
cards.description: Battle droids wipe out a clan of red-robed witches in a swamp.

cards.title: Shadow Collective
cards.description: The horned Sith Maul seizes the domed warrior world of Mandalore.

cards.title: Battle of Felucia
cards.description: Clones and Jedi fight through a world of giant fungus and color.

cards.title: Battle of Scipio
cards.description: War reaches the icy vault-world of the galaxy's bankers.

cards.title: The Trial of Ahsoka
cards.description: A young Jedi is wrongly accused and walks away from the Order.

cards.title: Battle of Anaxes
cards.description: An elite squad of unusual clones turns the tide of a shipyard siege.

cards.title: Siege of Mandalore
cards.description: A former padawan and clones storm Mandalore to capture the Sith Maul.

cards.title: Battle of Coruscant
cards.description: A vast space battle rages above the capital as the Chancellor is rescued.

cards.title: Battle of Kashyyyk
cards.description: Wookiees and clones defend a forest world of giant trees.

cards.title: Battle of Utapau
cards.description: A Jedi hunts a four-armed cyborg general in a sinkhole city.

cards.title: Order 66
cards.description: The Chancellor turns the clones on the Jedi, who are betrayed and destroyed.

cards.title: Duel on Mustafar
cards.description: A master and his fallen apprentice duel above rivers of lava.

cards.title: Birth of the Twins
cards.description: Twin children are hidden away as the galaxy falls to darkness.

cards.title: Birth of the Empire
cards.description: A Chancellor crowns himself Emperor before a cheering Senate.

cards.title: Clone Force 99
cards.description: A squad of defective clones goes rogue as the Empire rises.

cards.title: The Fall of Kamino
cards.description: The Empire destroys the clone cloning world it no longer needs.

cards.title: Night of a Thousand Tears
cards.description: The Empire devastates the Mandalorian homeworld from orbit.

cards.title: The Death Star Rises
cards.description: The Empire begins building a moon-sized battle station in secret.

cards.title: The Hermit of Tatooine
cards.description: A hunted Jedi master lives in hiding, watching over a desert boy.

cards.title: The Conveyex Heist
cards.description: Outlaws raid an armored cargo train on a snowy mountain bridge.

cards.title: The Mud Trenches of Mimban
cards.description: Imperial soldiers slog through the muddy trenches of a war-torn world.

cards.title: The Kessel Run
cards.description: A young smuggler pilots a freighter through a deadly maelstrom.

cards.title: Kenobi and Vader
cards.description: The old master and the masked Sith cross blades again among ruins.

cards.title: The Ghost Crew
cards.description: A ragtag rebel crew and their freighter begin striking the Empire.

cards.title: The Aldhani Heist
cards.description: Rebels rob an Imperial garrison under a sky of meteors.

cards.title: The Narkina 5 Break
cards.description: Slave-labor prisoners stage a desperate escape from a white factory prison.

cards.title: The Ferrix Uprising
cards.description: A funeral becomes a riot that ignites open rebellion.

cards.title: Twilight of the Apprentice
cards.description: Jedi confront the masked Sith Lord amid an ancient Sith temple.

cards.title: The Inquisitor
cards.description: A red-bladed Imperial Jedi hunter stalks the surviving rebels.

cards.title: Battle of Atollon
cards.description: A rebel base is besieged by an Imperial fleet led by a master tactician.

cards.title: The Bendu
cards.description: A colossal ancient Force-being awakens between the light and the dark.

cards.title: The Defection of Mon Mothma
cards.description: A senator risks everything to openly defy the Emperor.

cards.title: Birth of the Rebellion
cards.description: Scattered cells unite into one Alliance to fight the Empire.

cards.title: The Lothal Resistance
cards.description: Rebels strike the Imperial factories of a grassland world.

cards.title: The Rescue of Hera
cards.description: Rebels break their captured pilot out of an Imperial stronghold.

cards.title: Liberation of Lothal
cards.description: Rebel cells drive the Empire off a backwater world.

cards.title: The Purrgil
cards.description: A young Jedi summons space whales to banish an Imperial fleet.

cards.title: Mustering at Sullust
cards.description: The Rebel fleet gathers above a volcanic world before its boldest strike.

cards.title: The Fall of Jedha
cards.description: The Empire tests its superweapon on a desert holy city.

cards.title: The Eadu Strike
cards.description: Rebels raid a rain-lashed mountain research base.

cards.title: Battle of Scarif
cards.description: Rebels die stealing the plans to the Empire's planet-killing station.

cards.title: Destruction of Alderaan
cards.description: The battle station destroys a peaceful planet in a single blast.

cards.title: Escape from the Death Star
cards.description: Heroes flee the battle station through corridors of stormtroopers.

cards.title: Battle of Yavin
cards.description: A pilot destroys the planet-killing battle station with a single torpedo.

cards.title: Battle of Hoth
cards.description: Towering walkers assault a hidden Rebel base on a frozen world.

cards.title: The Asteroid Field
cards.description: A freighter dodges through a deadly field of giant tumbling rocks.

cards.title: Duel on Cloud City
cards.description: A young hero loses a hand and learns a terrible truth in a floating city.

cards.title: Escape from Cloud City
cards.description: Heroes flee a betrayal in a city floating in orange clouds.

cards.title: Rescue at Jabba's Palace
cards.description: Heroes free a frozen friend and battle a crime lord on a sail barge.

cards.title: Battle of Endor
cards.description: The Rebels destroy a second battle station above a forest moon; the Emperor falls.

cards.title: Battle of Jakku
cards.description: The Empire's last fleet is shattered above a desert graveyard of ships.

cards.title: A Mandalorian and the Child
cards.description: A lone bounty hunter takes in a mysterious Force-sensitive green child.

cards.title: The Mandalorian Covert
cards.description: Hidden Mandalorians forge beskar armor in secret tunnels.

cards.title: The Dark Troopers
cards.description: Black battle droids march the halls of an Imperial cruiser.

cards.title: The Rescue of Grogu
cards.description: A caped Jedi and Mandalorians storm a cruiser to save a kidnapped child.

cards.title: The Krayt Dragon
cards.description: Villagers and a Mandalorian slay a colossal sand dragon.

cards.title: The Return of Boba Fett
cards.description: An armored bounty hunter claims a crime throne in a desert palace.

cards.title: The Battle of Mos Espa
cards.description: A crime war erupts in the streets of a desert spaceport town.

cards.title: Grogu Meets the Jedi
cards.description: A robed Jedi begins to train the small green foundling.

cards.title: The Shadow Council
cards.description: Imperial warlords plot in secret to rebuild their fallen empire.

cards.title: The Return of Thrawn
cards.description: A white-bladed Jedi hunts a blue-skinned Imperial warlord across the stars.

cards.title: The Reconquest of Mandalore
cards.description: Mandalorian clans unite to retake their poisoned homeworld.

cards.title: The Hosnian Cataclysm
cards.description: A new superweapon destroys the Republic capital from across the galaxy.

cards.title: Battle of Takodana
cards.description: First Order forces attack a castle by a forest lake.

cards.title: Battle of Starkiller Base
cards.description: The Resistance destroys a planet-sized weapon carved into an icy world.

cards.title: Duel in the Snow
cards.description: A scavenger and a masked dark warrior duel with sabers in a snowy forest.

cards.title: The Last Jedi
cards.description: A scavenger finds the lost master on a remote ocean island.

cards.title: The Praetorian Guard
cards.description: Two Force-users fight back to back against red-armored guards.

cards.title: The Holdo Maneuver
cards.description: A lone ship jumps to lightspeed through an enemy fleet, splitting it apart.

cards.title: Battle of Crait
cards.description: Speeders race across a white salt flat that bleeds red beneath them.

cards.title: Battle of Exegol
cards.description: The Resistance and a fleet of resurrected Sith warships clash above a dark world.
